__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — AATCC standard + classical optics, frozen

claim.property: Kubelka-Munk K/S formula structural form + tristimulus bounds
claim.formula: K/S = (1 - R_inf)^2 / (2 * R_inf), where R_inf is reflectance of infinitely thick layer
claim.condition: diffuse reflectance, opaque substrate, lambert scattering assumption

source.primary: AATCC Test Method 6 (1993) — instrumental color measurement of dyed textiles
source.secondary: Kubelka & Munk 1931 Z. Tech. Phys. 12, 593 — 'Ein Beitrag zur Optik der Farbanstriche'
source.citation: AATCC TM6 + Kubelka-Munk 1931 Z. Tech. Phys. 12, 593 — K/S = (1-R_inf)^2 / (2 R_inf); K/S(0.5) = 0.25 exactly

tolerance.basis: K/S formula is closed-form analytic; AATCC accepts ± 0.5% reflectance for instrument
